subject: [PATCH 10/24] nfsd: add callback encoding and decoding linkages for CB_NOTIFY

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch adds routines for encoding and decoding CB_NOTIFY messages in the NFSv4 callback protocol. It introduces new functions to encode and decode the CB_NOTIFY message, which is used to notify a client of changes on the server. The encoding and decoding processes involve calling into code generated by xdrgen to perform the actual encoding and decoding. This patch also updates the nfsd/nfs4callback.c file to include the new encoding and decoding functions.
